name: Gilberto Antoniazzi
background: Mr. Antoniazzi has served as our Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since May 2018. Prior to joining Livent, he was Chief Financial Officer for FMC Agricultural Solutions from 2013 to 2018. He held various financial and management roles at FMC since 1993.
